creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2010-01-28 01:14:10 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    devel                Makefile 
  Added files:
    devel/p5-Config-INI-MVP Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  The MVP INI file reader reads INI files, but can handle properties with
  multiple values. The identification of properties that may have multiple
  entries is done by section, on a plugin basis.
  following file:
  
  WWW: http://search.cpan.org/dist/Config-INI-MVP
  
  PR:             ports/142055
  Submitted by:   Andrey Kostenko <andrey at kostenko.name>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.3801    +1 -0      ports/devel/Makefile
  1.1       +26 -0     ports/devel/p5-Config-INI-MVP/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/devel/p5-Config-INI-MVP/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/devel/p5-Config-INI-MVP/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +12 -0     ports/devel/p5-Config-INI-MVP/pkg-plist (new)
